samples:
I had to go my own way
And struggle with myself
It's all I know, there is no other
But this need I have to face
And come to terms with what I find out


Now, the time has come for me to see
The light of day that always was on high
So long, I want to leave behind me
All those things that once belonged to me and died


My words are very sad
Because now I must say goodbye
Goodbye, my love, I give away
In the river let you flow free

This blood boils inside me
I don't feel like crying
There's so much to forget in life
When it's over we will cry


I lay awake at night
Counting sheep before I fall asleep
And when the morning comes around again
I wake up from a dream and crawl across the floor
With my head held down low
Upon this cold hard ground
Lying flat upon my back
Like a dead body in the ground

Now I lie and watch them play
They tell me stories about love
Life could not be better than this
For those who can't even try
These lies just tear apart
All that I've been building

I'm sick of being told what to do
There is a price I have to pay
To feel the pain, I must bleed my life away


No one cares where you go or from where you come
But no one knows how you feel inside


What will become of us?
We're all so fragile and weak
What becomes of our race?
Is there an end for us all?

It starts with a whisper
You hear it just before
The ground beneath your feet
Begins to crumble down
And then, you find yourself on the edge
You can almost see the bottom
All around you are stones
On top of which you stand


Now that you've fallen, get up and crawl away
Get up again and struggle through this maze of pain
Your tears flow free, fall upon the cold concrete
Feel the cold wind on your face


Watch as these giant waves devour the sky
This wall of water moving like a thousand snakes
They grow at once to swallow everything in sight
Devouring light, they come crashing down

In the morning I wake up and I feel like a lion
I walk all around my kingdom to find what's inside of me
But you know, sometimes it takes forever, to remember who we are
And when we finally see the light, it makes us wanna scream

This is our time to go on the rampage
There ain't nothing but fear that can stop us now
We take back what was stolen from us
From those who would not protect they robbed
Those who were born with power and vision
With fire in their eyes and will to destroy
Let us enter this labyrinth of steel and concrete


You don't even recognize yourself
How could you do this to yourself?
Have mercy, oh my god!
The chains will fall upon your neck one day
Get ready for the punishment
When the wheels come down at last


Forced into submission by this living monster
This giant serpent made of metal and concrete
It has swallowed up many great souls before it
It's a huge snake, its head rests in silence

I am the child of light
Created by the power to create
In me resides the strength and might
To control matter through will alone


This is my body, this is my soul
Behold a god's creation in form
A spirit that can move mountain ranges
And rivers that flow from on high


I don't belong here, I have no right to be here
So long as you do not feel like laughing at me
I won't cry or scream out loud but
Please forgive me for I must leave now

Before my face was lifted up and set free
From all forms of cruelty and torture
How could I possibly think of staying here?
No way, I just had to get away

There are things I want to tell them
There are words inside that need saying
The only chance they have to see what's happening
Is if I keep myself alive


Come back soon, please
Don't forget me, please
Oh please come back
Please stay, there's so much more to learn

I'm tired of this
But I don't want to go
I'll live until I die


What are you saying?
This is the only way out?
It hurts me so much
To even hear your words


I find myself here
In this cage of steel and iron bars
Unable to move, unable to speak
You think that I am dead?
Oh no...


Take a look at me
The light in my eyes is still alive
I can feel it burning bright
All around me, all around me
Feel this fire inside
Set me free from these walls
Open up your heart for me now
Show your love to me


There's nothing else but hate
That comes through this cell to me
Just leave me alone, please
Let me be on my own

Now I see the light
And I run into its arms
Now I meet my master
He has been right from the start
Overwhelming power
Of the one who sets us free
There's no reason left for me
Nothing more to do

As I watch the world go by
I realize that my time has come to die
The taste of life so bitter and sour
Can't believe it was real, now it's gone


But when we have a reason to live
We fight for what is right against all the odds
So let us try one last time
One last time
And stand up straight and strong
Against all the odds
It hurts me so much
To see our own children grow into monsters
The power they hold in their hands
Is too great for them to control
This hatred must end somehow
No more suffering!

The only way forward
Is to break free from this nightmare
Awaken to new dawn dawning over
New light approaching at speed of light
Don't be afraid!
All you need is to find your inner strength
That sets you free
You will overcome
Everything and reach beyond the stars


But when we have a reason to live
We fight for what is right against all the odds
Let us try one last time

On a cold, dark night
In the woods I'm waiting to meet my end


My blood is boiling, burning out of control
The taste of fire on my lips and tongue


I feel it coming
No one can deny this truth in me


Another river flows away from here
And another life goes by


Now I'm running through the trees and over rocks
Over walls made of stone


Oh, what makes us tick? And why does time even exist?
Why are we all so blind? Why should you die alone?

This pain that kills me kills me fast
You cannot kill the light inside


Can't get no air in my lungs, my legs won't move
Face down, I'm suffocating beneath this weight
There's nothing but a load of memories I've been carrying around
For ages now, for years I've tried to free myself
But I have no power anymore
So long I held my breath

I'm fading away from your light
You take my breath away, I have to let you go


Out of the silence I was born
This is where I belong


Now that I see you, now that I know
That this is what we are all meant to do and die
The walls were so high and thick before
But there was no other way than going through them

Just like a flash in the night, but I feel it inside me
Flashes of lightning strike down on my vision
No matter how strong, nothing can stand against time
And yet another sunset has come for us all to see


It's too late now, we don't understand
Life is just an illusion, please forgive me


The walls were so high and thick before
But there was no other way than going through them
Just like a flash in the night, but I feel it inside me
Flashes of lightning strike down on my vision
No matter how strong, nothing can stand against time
And yet another sunset has come for us all to see

There's a wind blowing
It comes from the end of the world
The taste is bitter and cold
And no one can tell me why


I want to believe in you, I want to see you there
I want to touch your body, I want to feel your breath
You open up my mind with all this power you bring
Your eyes are watching over us but we're not alone
The winds blow so strong and they're carrying a message
They've been calling out for you and have brought you here
But it feels like home, yeah, since you came along
The only words that matter are those you say
We are standing on higher ground now than before
There's an energy flowing through our veins
A kind of love being shared between two souls
Between you and me, between human beings


Life itself depends upon the blood running through our veins
It flows from head to toe, from heart to fingertips
When we give life to something new, we let it flow within us
Our brain was meant to do what our hands were made to do

We're so tired of this situation
We're wasting away our lives here on the run
And when we die, no one will remember us


Running for our lives and all over the place
Just try to understand the rules
I can see your face now from a thousand miles away
And I know I am alive
You keep me awake with tears in my eyes
Every time you talk to me
The silence is deafening as far as I go
But I hear every word you say

Are you really gone?
There was nothing left to take from us
That's what they told us
They said: "See ya later"
Forcing smiles and saying things just to get along
If there is even a chance, if there is any light at all
Open your heart and help us find it out


Now you're running through the flames
In an open cage made of lies
Please don't forget what happened to us
Give us strength to overcome this pain
